statement: A weightless cantilever beam AB is fixed at A (x=0) and free at B (x=3 m). A uniform distributed load of 400 N/m acts downward along the entire length. Find the reaction force and reaction moment at the fixed support A.
common_student_errors: Using the distributed load intensity (400 N/m) directly in equations instead of computing the resultant (1200 N)
Placing the resultant of the distributed load at the end B instead of at the centroid (midpoint, x=1.5 m)
Forgetting the reaction moment MA at a fixed support
